channel.title: Error: Cannot find module ( creating theme)
channel.description:
Hi,
I am following the tutorial and I got an error customising my theme
1) I changed the line after packed as instructed in the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFY3GPfoKR4 around 42:00 }, "packages": [ { "name": "storygenietheme", "name": "@frontity/wp-source", "state": {
2) I went back to the terminal and ran frontity nx dev
3) I was prompted to open in a new window because I was already running local 3000 but I decided to run it on the same server.
4) When I went back to the site and refreshed the page I got the cannot find module error ( don't have a screenshot)
Should I start over? I got the theme folder installed
![Screenshot 2020-07-28 at 16.23.32|428x500](upload://2RIJ8Dla5w3YD2h6KGwuRNyU5AU.png)
but the site is now inaccessible
# This site can’t be reached
**localhost** refused to connect.
Try:
* Checking the connection * [Checking the proxy and the firewall](chrome-error://chromewebdata/#buttons)
ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED
Thank you for your help.
Stephen

item.title: Error: Cannot find module ( creating theme)
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
3 posts were split to a new topic: Error: Cannot find module (creating theme)

Read full topic
item.source: Error: Cannot find module ( creating theme)

item.title: Error: Cannot find module ( creating theme)
item.dc:creator: stblackman
item.description:
Hi,

I am following the tutorial and I got an error customising my theme

  1. I changed the line after packed as instructed in the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFY3GPfoKR4 around 42:00
    },
    “packages”: [
    {
    “name”: “storygenietheme”,
    “name”: “@frontity/wp-source”,
    “state”: {

  2. I went back to the terminal and ran frontity nx dev

  3. I was prompted to open in a new window because I was already running local 3000 but I decided to run it on the same server.

  4. When I went back to the site and refreshed the page I got the cannot find module error ( don’t have a screenshot)

Should I start over? I got the theme folder installed

but the site is now inaccessible

This site can’t be reached

localhost refused to connect.

Try:

  • Checking the connection
  • Checking the proxy and the firewall

ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED

Thank you for your help.

Stephen

Read full topic
item.source: Error: Cannot find module ( creating theme)
